items.headline: BAL 2026 - Sahara Conference Day 1 Top 5 Plays
items.description: (5) Ater Majok gets the dish from Papa Diallo and throws down the ferocious two-hand slam (4) Mouhamadou Diagne soars into the sky, putting Cheikh Diong on a poster with this insane putback slam (3) Chris Echui absolutely rejects a driving Anthony Pritchard, deflecting the ball all the way into the stands. (2) Jamelle Hagins shows the elite skill on both ends of the floor after he pins Deng Angok Deng's layup attempt, then smashes in a dunk on the other end, turning offense to defense on this incredible play. (1) Lamine Badji throws down an emphatic alley-oop slam off the pass from Samba Fall
